voice_tells: operator-investor — both hands on the wheel
12-year career arc across SaaS / fintech / crypto
vang sailing-rope metaphor: hold things in tension, capture what wind there is
anti_patterns: no generic stock dots-on-dark growth-chart imagery
no $/X/Y stat strip in a navy gradient box
matteisn.style_guidance: Editorial magazine feel. Restrained palette: navy + teal + paper. Specific over generic. Sailing/maritime metaphor (vang = boom rope) is core. Hand-drawn or geometric vector — never photorealistic 3D. If photographic, real moments not stock.

voice_tells: the dataset itself is the moat
anti_patterns: no portfolio-grid logo wall as illustration
vang-capital.style_guidance: Geometric / vector / line-art. Sailing-rope (boom + sheet line) motif as signature mark. Navy + purple gradient — never solid purple. Triangles, lines, dots evoking sail-shape and tension. Restrained, premium, institutional feel.

voice_tells: for early-stage companies and the people who fund them
vang-advisory.style_guidance: Same Vang geometric language as vang-capital. Differs by emphasis — service / craft / process visuals (vs vang-capital's portfolio / outcome visuals). Diagrammatic, schematic, technical-blueprint feel.

voice_tells: Zerg builds AI systems for mission-critical work
anti_patterns: NO 'AI lab' or 'AI-native software stack' framing
NO 'consulting' or 'consultancy' — Zerg is product + service
no Tailwind defaults #F4A261 / #1FC78D — those were scrubbed
zerg-default.style_guidance: Cream paper warmth + charcoal text + burnt-orange accent. Industrial / process / blueprint feel — wires, signals, instrumentation, terminal aesthetics. Zerg as the 'operating loop' — MAP/BUILD/PROVE/RUN as a recurring pattern. Mission-critical infrastructure register, not consumer app.

voice_tells: Zerg builds AI systems for mission-critical work
anti_patterns: same as zerg-default — never 'AI lab', never 'consultancy'
zerg-dark.style_guidance: Charcoal paper, cream foreground, brighter burnt-orange accent. For research / engineering / technical-deep content where the dark-mode register is appropriate. Same operating-loop motif language as zerg-default.
